nasb.text: For everyone who does evil hates the Light, and does not come to the Light for fear that his deeds will be exposed.

esv.text: For everyone who does wicked things hates the light and does not come to the light, lest his works should be exposed.

cnv.text: 凡作惡的都恨光，不來接近光，免得他的惡行暴露出來。

ccb.text: 作恶的人恨光，不肯接近光，恐怕他们的罪行暴露出来。

csbs.text: 事实上，所有作恶的人，都憎恨光，不来到光那里，免得自己的行为被揭露出来；
